name: Composite Widget
summary: Focus management and navigation protocol for complex widgets like Grids, Trees, and Menus, implementing the Roving Tabindex pattern. The reusable roving container behind the webdocs toolbar assemblerPreset (#1409) — set role=toolbar to realize a toolbar with no new block.

role.description: The ARIA role applied to the roving container, so one consumer can repurpose the same single-Tab-stop roving-tabindex container for a specific composite pattern. Set role="toolbar" to realize the toolbar preset (#1409 ruling: toolbar = focus-delegation intent + this block, consumed via the webdocs toolbar assemblerPreset — no new toolbar artifact). Other container roles reuse the identical focus-delegation mechanics.

rovingTabindex.usage: Implements the Roving Tabindex focus model for composite widgets (grids, trees, menus): exactly one descendant is `tabindex="0"`, all others `tabindex="-1"`, and the value moves with focus so the widget is a single Tab stop.
